info.title: Basalam Dropshipping Platform API
info.description: API for the Basalam dropshipping platform

post.description:
Register a new user with an account

Creates user, account, and returns tokens

schema.title: Response Register With Account Api V1 Auth Register With Account Post

post.description:
Login with phone number and password

Returns access and refresh tokens

Refresh access token using refresh token

Returns new access and refresh tokens

Logout (server-side token invalidation)

Blacklists the current access token and optionally the refresh token
from the request body. Blacklisted tokens are stored in Redis with a
TTL equal to the token's remaining lifetime, so keys are cleaned up
automatically once the token expires.

get.description: Get current authenticated user info

post.description: Change user password

Request password reset using phone number.

Generates a 6-digit OTP, stores it in Redis with 10 min TTL,
and sends it via Kavenegar SMS.

Reset password using OTP sent via SMS.

Validates the OTP from Redis and updates the password.

get.description: List users (admin only)

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Auth Users Get

get.description: Get user by ID (admin only)
List accounts for current user

schema.title: Response List Accounts Api V1 Auth Accounts Get

post.description: Create a new account for current user

get.description: Get account by ID

post.description:
Create a new order

Validates inventory availability and creates order with items

get.description: List orders with filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Orders Api V1 Orders  Get

get.description: Get order by ID

post.description:
Cancel an order

Only orders in certain statuses can be cancelled

get.description: List items for an order

schema.title: Response List Order Items Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Items Get

get.description: Get order item by ID
Get order status history

schema.title: Response List Order History Api V1 Orders  Order Id  History Get

get.description: List shipments for an order

schema.title: Response List Shipments Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Shipments Get

get.description: Get shipment by ID

post.description: Confirm delivery of a shipment
Confirm an order
Mark order as paid
Mark order as shipped
Mark order as delivered
Complete an order (final status)

get.description: List product categories

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Products Categories Get

post.description: Create a new category

get.description: Get category by ID

post.description: Create a new supplier product

get.description: List supplier products with filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Products Api V1 Products  Get

get.description: Browse product catalog (for sellers)

schema.title: Response Browse Catalog Api V1 Products Catalog Get

get.description: Get product by ID (requires authentication, not ownership)

delete.description: Delete a product (soft delete by setting status to archived)

get.description: List variants for a product

schema.title: Response List Variants Api V1 Products  Product Id  Variants Get

post.description: Create a product variant

get.description: Get variant by ID
Get supplier variant details (price, inventory)

post.description: Create a seller listing from a supplier product

get.description: Get seller listing by ID
List seller variants for a listing

schema.title: Response List Seller Variants Api V1 Products Listings  Listing Id  Variants Get

patch.description: Update seller variant price or enabled status

get.description: List media for a product

schema.title: Response List Product Media Api V1 Products  Product Id  Media Get

post.description: Add media to a product
Create a new shop. Role can ONLY be 'supplier' or 'seller'.

get.description: List shops for the current user's accounts, optionally filtered by account/role.

schema.title: Response List Shops Api V1 Shops  Get

get.description: Get shop by ID.

post.description: Connect shop to Basalam platform. One integration per shop.

get.description: List integrations for a shop (max 1 per shop).

schema.title: Response List Integrations Api V1 Shops  Shop Id  Integrations Get

post.description: Disconnect a platform integration.
Start OAuth flow. Returns authorization URL to redirect user.
Handle OAuth callback — exchange code for tokens.
Trigger manual product sync for integration.

get.description: Get sync status for integration.

Basic health check endpoint
Returns overall status of the service

Detailed health check endpoint
Checks database, Redis, and Kafka connections
Liveness probe - indicates if service is running
Readiness probe - indicates if service can handle requests

post.description: Main webhook ingestion endpoint for all platforms

get.description: Returns aggregated health metrics for the webhook system
Get webhook status for a specific integration.
List entries in the outgoing webhook dead letter queue.

schema.title: Response List Outgoing Dlq Api V1 Webhooks Outgoing Dlq Get

post.description: Manually retry a failed webhook from the DLQ.

delete.description: Remove an entry from the outgoing webhook DLQ.

get.description: List current user's notifications. Optionally filter to unread only.

schema.title: Response List Notifications Api V1 Notifications  Get

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read

post.description: Mark all of the current user's notifications as read

get.description: Return count of unread notifications for the current user

List variant inventory for a shop.

Returns variant details with stock counts.
Optionally filter by product_id or low-stock variants only.

parameters.name: low_stock_only

schema.description: Only return variants with low stock
schema.title: Low Stock Only

parameters.description: Only return variants with low stock

patch.description:
Manual inventory override.

Sets inventory to an absolute value. Only allowed for supplier shops.
Creates an InventoryLog entry for audit.

get.description:
List active inventory reservations.

Optionally filter by shop or reservation status.

schema.title: Response List Reservations Api V1 Inventory Reservations Get

post.description:
Adjust inventory by a relative amount.

Creates an InventoryLog entry for audit.
Positive quantity_change adds stock, negative subtracts.

patch.description: Force update inventory for a variant. Admin only.
Force cancel an order. Admin only. Optionally refund.

post.description: Resolve a dispute between seller and supplier.
Review and act on a fraud signal.

get.description: List fraud signals with optional filtering.

Get status of product/inventory sync operations.

Returns sync metrics for all shops.

post.description: Retry a failed webhook delivery (incoming or outgoing).

get.description: List all shops with optional filtering.

patch.description: Update shop status/active state. Admin only.

get.description: List all users with optional filtering.
List all orders across all shops. Admin only.
Aggregated system-wide stats for the admin dashboard.
List all payments across all shops. Admin only.
List all disputes across all orders. Admin only.

post.description:
Initiate a wallet deposit via Zarinpal payment gateway.

Returns a payment URL to redirect the user to.

get.description:
Handle payment gateway callback (verification).

For Zarinpal, the gateway sends Authority and Status as query parameters.

post.description:
Handle payment gateway callback (verification).

For Zarinpal, the gateway sends Authority and Status as query parameters.

get.description: Get current user's wallet balance and pending amount.

post.description:
Pay for an order from wallet balance.

Uses atomic row locking to prevent double-payment.
Deducts items cost + shipping + commission from wallet.

get.description: List payments with filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Payments Api V1 Payments  Get

get.description: Get payment by ID
List supplier payouts with filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Payouts Api V1 Payments Payouts  Get

get.description: Get payout by ID
List disputes with filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Disputes Api V1 Payments Disputes  Get

get.description: Get dispute by ID
List shipments with optional filters. Scoped to user's shops unless admin.

schema.title: Response List Shipments Api V1 Shipping Shipments Get

get.description: Get shipment by ID

patch.description:
Update tracking information for a shipment.

Only accessible by supplier shop owners. The shipment must belong to
an order item sourced from the supplier's shop.

post.description:
Confirm delivery of a shipment.

Triggers payout release for the supplier via a DeliveryConfirmed domain event.

get.description: List available shipping methods, optionally filtered by platform.

schema.title: Response List Shipping Methods Api V1 Shipping Methods Get

get.description: Root endpoint
Simple ping endpoint
Prometheus metrics endpoint. Requires admin authentication.
